section.heading: Funding

content.p: For the purpose of grants under section 300dd–31 of this title, there are authorized to be appropriated $100,000,000 for each of the fiscal years 1989 and 1990.

section.sourceCredit: (July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XXIV, § 2433, as added Pub. L. 100–607, title II, § 211, Nov. 4, 1988, 102 Stat. 3091.)
